name: nexus-similarity-search-api

description_variants.claude: Computes a stateless, distribution-aware composite similarity score fusing NMI and cosine metrics over ad-hoc vector payloads, requiring no database or prior indexing.
description_variants.gpt: Call this function to score pairwise similarity between two feature vectors using entropy-weighted NMI plus cosine fusion; returns a single calibrated float with no setup or indexing required.
description_variants.gemini: Tool for on-demand similarity scoring that combines Normalized Mutual Information for nonlinear feature dependencies and cosine alignment into one entropy-calibrated score per API call.

value_equivalent: $310 per hour of manual feature-similarity engineering avoided
invocation_examples: Compare these two product embedding vectors and tell me how similar they are accounting for nonlinear category encodings
Score similarity between user behavioral feature arrays without loading a vector database
Given two ad-hoc JSON payloads of mixed numeric and encoded categorical features, return a single fused similarity score
